content: I will write the complete `walkthrough.md` file as an artifact to explain the design, implementation details, and verification results of the newly integrated Affiliate Program.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Detailed walkthrough of the production-ready Affiliate Program system implementation, covering database migrations, client tracking, checkout integration, user portal dashboard, and admin manager sections."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough: Complete Production-Ready Affiliate Program

We have successfully implemented and verified the complete, production-ready **Affiliate Program system** for your eCommerce store. The system connects Supabase storage, real-time client-side tracking, checkout calculations with customizable logic, a customer-facing Affiliate Dashboard, and an extensive admin management panel.

---

## Technical Architecture & Changes

### 1. Database Schema
Created and applied the Supabase migrations file [08_create_affiliate_system.sql](file:///Applications/Store/Store/src/migrations/08_create_affiliate_system.sql) defining the following schemas:
- `public.website_store_affiliates`: Holds registered affiliate details, their unique referral code, active toggle status, and creation timestamps.
- `public.website_store_affiliate_clicks`: Tracks link clicks with full device details (IP, user agent, browser) and indicates whether a click is unique to prevent traffic spoofing.
- `public.website_store_affiliate_commissions`: Records calculated commission details per order, referrer, referee, status flow, and timestamp.
- `public.website_store_affiliate_withdrawals`: Logs withdrawal request details (UPI ID, bank particulars, request amount, status).
- `public.website_store_affiliate_settings`: Key-value JSONB parameters table for global variables.
- Added a `commission_percent` override column on `public.website_pooja_products`.

```mermaid
erDiagram
    website_store_users ||--o| website_store_affiliates : "is affiliate"
    website_store_affiliates ||--o{ website_store_affiliate_clicks : "receives click"
    website_store_affiliates ||--o{ website_store_affiliate_commissions : "earns commission"
    website_store_affiliates ||--o{ website_store_affiliate_withdrawals : "requests payout"
    website_store_affiliate_settings {
        string key PK
        jsonb value
    }
```

### 2. Attribution & URL Tracking
